creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Aleks from comment #4)

Are those spaces intentional? As you pasted:

allow 192.168. *. *
allow 192.168.3. *
allow 192.168.31. *
deny 192. *. *. *
deny 224. *. *. *
deny 172.16. *. *
deny 172.16. *. *
deny 10. *. *. *
deny 169.254. *. *

Or it should be like this?

allow 192.168.*.*
allow 192.168.3.*
allow 192.168.31.*
deny 192.*.*.*
deny 224.*.*.*
deny 172.16.*.*
deny 172.16.*.*
deny 10.*.*.*
deny 169.254.*.*
